message:
fix: unify add card bubble position across all dashboard pages (#3834) (#3845)

The add card "+" bubble was positioned on the left/right edges of cards
on non-homepage dashboards (clusters, compliance, etc.), while the
homepage used a top-right corner position. This updates
DashboardComponents.tsx to match the SharedSortableCard.tsx pattern,
placing a single "+" bubble at the top-right corner of each card on
hover for visual consistency across all pages.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

-          aria-label="Insert card after this one"

+          className="absolute -top-2 -right-2 z-20 opacity-0 group-hover/card:opacity-100 transition-all w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold shadow-lg hover:scale-110 ring-2 ring-background"
